title: brachyglottis huntii
intro: Brachyglottis huntii, also known as the Pittosporum huntii, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Brachyglottis huntii include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant. Herbal preparations of Brachyglottis huntii are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
